title: KAGEM Board Meeting Q4 2024
agenda:
1. FY2024 Production Review
2. Phase 3 Expansion Update
3. Dividend Declaration
4. ESG Report
minutes: Board reviewed FY2024 production of 32.5M carats. Phase 3 expansion on track. Dividend of ZMW 255M declared.

resolutions.title: FY2024 Dividend Declaration
resolutions.description: Declare a final dividend of ZMW 255,000,000 for FY2024, representing 30% of net profit.

title: ZESCO Board Meeting — Turnaround Plan
agenda:
1. Turnaround Plan Approval
2. Tariff Increase Roadmap
3. Debt Restructuring Update
minutes: Board approved ZESCO turnaround plan. Tariff increase of 25% approved effective January 2025.

resolutions.title: Approval of ZESCO Turnaround Plan 2025-2027
resolutions.description: Approve the ZESCO Turnaround Plan 2025-2027 including tariff increases, cost reduction targets, and debt restructuring.

title: ZANACO Board Meeting Q3 2024
agenda:
1. Q3 Financial Results
2. NPL Management Update
3. Digital Banking Strategy
4. Risk Report
minutes: Q3 results reviewed. Net profit ZMW 825M YTD. NPL ratio at 6.2%. Digital banking users grew 18%.

resolutions.title: Approval of Digital Banking Investment
resolutions.description: Approve ZMW 180M investment in digital banking platform upgrade for FY2025.

title: KAGEM AGM 2025
agenda:
1. Adoption of FY2024 Annual Report
2. Appointment of Auditors
3. Director Re-elections
4. Dividend Payment Confirmation
